title: Rustins Wood Dye Walnut 250ml
features: High-Quality Colour Options: Rustins Wood Dye offers a range of rich, vibrant colours that enhance the natural beauty of your wood. Choose from various shades to match your project needs
Deep Penetration: This wood dye penetrates deeply into the wood grain, providing long-lasting colour and protection. It enhances the natural texture and grain patterns of the wood
Quick Drying: Rustins Wood Dye dries quickly, allowing you to move on to the next step of your project sooner. Ideal for both amateur DIYers and professional craftsmen. ADD TO BASKET now
Easy Application: Suitable for use on all types of wood, this dye can be applied with a brush, cloth, or spray. It ensures a smooth, even application with excellent coverage
Various Sizes Available: Available in multiple sizes, Rustins Wood Dye can accommodate any project, large or small. Perfect for furniture, floors, cabinets, and more
description: From the manufacturer Rustins Wood Dye For use on bare wood prior to finishing with any of Rustins wood finishes. Fast drying penetrating stain does not raise the grain. Supplied in 11 shades, which may be intermixed to make an infinite variety of natural wood shades. Suitable for interior and exterior use.
